rule_metadata.name: net
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'net' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule net
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'net' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "net"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = " localgroup Administrators localadm /ADD " nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /\\net\.exe\\"\saccounts/ nocase ascii wide
		$string3 = /\\net\.exe.{0,1000}\slocalgroup\sadmin/ nocase ascii wide
		$string4 = /\\net\.exe.{0,1000}\ssessions/ nocase ascii wide

		$string7 = "net  group \"domain admins\" /domain" nocase ascii wide

		$string13 = "net  user admin P@ssw0rd!" nocase ascii wide
		$string14 = /net\s\.exe.{0,1000}\sgroup\s\\"ESX\sAdmins\\"/ nocase ascii wide
		$string15 = "net accounts /maxpwage:unlimited" nocase ascii wide
